title: PriceRecordIdentifiers
description: The `Price Record` object used in batch create or update.

price_list_id.description: The Price List with which this price record is associated.

variant_id.description: The variant with which this price record is associated. Either `variant_id` or `sku` is required.

sku.description: The variant with which this price record is associated. Either `sku` or `variant_id` is required.

currency.description: The 3-letter currency code with which this price set is associated.
